instruction:
Repair the disturbed scenic SVG: lavender field windmill.

Patch:
- remove sv_036-extra-survey-marker
- download-sv_036-ellipse-021.fill: "#ef4444" -> "#fff"
- download-sv_036-circle-001.cx: 1239.0 -> 1180
- download-sv_036-line-011.stroke-width: 6.0 -> 2
- download-sv_036-rect-002.opacity: 0.27 -> 0.6
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 1600 1000">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="sky16" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#9fb8e0" />
      <stop offset="0.5" stop-color="#e8c8d8" />
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#fbe8d0" />
    </linearGradient>
    <radialGradient id="sun16" cx="0.5" cy="0.5" r="0.5">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#fff6e0" /><stop offset="0.5" stop-color="#ffe0c0" stop-opacity="0.6" /><stop offset="1" stop-color="#ffe0c0" stop-opacity="0" />
    </radialGradient>
    <linearGradient id="field16" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#9a7ac0" /><stop offset="1" stop-color="#6a4a9a" />
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="mill16" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#d8c8a8" /><stop offset="1" stop-color="#a8967a" />
    </linearGradient>
    <filter id="haze16" x="-50%" y="-50%" width="200%" height="200%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="16" /></filter>
  </defs>

  <rect width="1600" height="1000" fill="url(#sky16)" id="download-sv_036-rect-001" />
  <circle cx="1239" cy="260" r="280" fill="url(#sun16)" id="download-sv_036-circle-001" />
  <circle cx="1180" cy="260" r="64" fill="#fffaf0" id="download-sv_036-circle-002" />

  
  <g fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.6" filter="url(#haze16)">
